title: Bold Laundry Detergent Pink Blossom 4.95L - 110 Wash | Professional Concentrated Liquid Biological Detergent | Fresh & Clean Washing | Long Lasting Fragrance
features: Professional-Grade Cleaning: Designed to meet the high standards of hotels, hospitality, and commercial laundry environments.
Powerful Stain Removal: Effectively tackles 100% of greasy stain types, leaving fabrics brilliantly clean.
Refreshing Pink Blossom Scent: An uplifting floral fragrance that combines sweet, delicate blossoms for a fresh and inviting scent.
Long-Lasting Freshness: Leaves clothes and linens smelling clean and pleasant after every wash.
Economical Size: 110 washes per bottle – ideal for heavy-duty or frequent laundry needs.
